name: Springans Branga
name_jp: スプリガンズ・バンガー
desc: If this card is in your hand, field, or GY: You can target 1 "Springans" Xyz Monster you control; attach this card to it as material. You can banish this card and 1 "Springans" monster with a different name from your GY; add 1 "Springans" card from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Springans Branga" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is in your hand, field, or GY: You can target 1 "Springans" Xyz Monster you control; attach this card to it as material. You can banish this card and 1 "Springans" monster with a different name from your GY; add 1 "Springans" card from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Springans Branga" once per turn.
eff: If this card is in your hand, field, or GY: You can target 1 "Springans" Xyz Monster you control; attach this card to it as material. You can banish this card and 1 "Springans" monster with a different name from your GY; add 1 "Springans" card from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Springans Branga" once per turn.

action: Attaches itself from your hand as Xyz Material
Attaches itself from your field as Xyz Material
Attaches itself from your Graveyard as Xyz Material
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
